scripts.install:all: npm ci --include=dev --workspaces=false --prefix backend && npm ci --include=dev --workspaces=false --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.verify:frontend: npm ci --include=dev --workspaces=false --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm test --prefix frontend
scripts.verify:backend: npm ci --include=dev --workspaces=false --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run lint:ci --prefix backend && npm run test:ci --prefix backend
